title: Microalgae fixation for FCM
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2ipbb","text":"Protocol for fixing microalgae for later enumeration by flow cytometry.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"6h17a","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7qp78","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"74fe2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"safety","mutability":"","data":{"blocks":[{"data":{},"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"9oggv","text":"Ensure a fume hood is used when aliquoting gluteraldehyde.","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{}}}}}
steps: Aliquot 2 µL of 50% gluteraldehyde into each of 3 cryovials. Use a fume hood for this step.
Add 198 µL of microalgal cell culture sample to each of the 3 cryovials for a final concentration of 0.5 % (v/v) gluteraldehyde.
Mix the sample with the gluteraldehyde by flicking the tube up to 15 times.
Incubate tube at 4 °C in the dark for 00:20:00 .
Flash freeze the tube in liquid nitrogen. Use appropriate protective clothing when handling liquid nitrogen.
Store at -80 °C until ready for FCM.
creator: Victoria LN Jackson
